form.formComment: Good performance to win by one length at this track over 400m (23.36) beating Bianca's Secret in Grade 5 on March 13. Was strong in the market and scored a soft win most recently. Stay with him.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 6th on April 10 over 320m at this track behind Stay Tipsy beaten 6 lengths (18.90) in a Grade 5. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Could only manage seventh last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when third (30.98) over 525m at this track. Has a low draw but will need the breaks to go her way.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 320m at this track. Will need to improve to feature.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (18.79) over 320m at this track. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Has ability and should run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began to lose momentum in the back straight and tailed the field.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Temora to win by a neck in 19.06, beating Jacobite Bounce. Last start finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 320m at this track behind Phoenix Umbrella beaten 9 lengths (19.24). Doesn't profile as a likely winner.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on, on the 1st turn and lost momentum.
Shortly after start checked off heels and lost ground.

form.formComment: Ran a better race when second behind Shifty Bulldozer at this track last start over 400m (22.85). Gets back so might need a bit of luck.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time when fourth (23.19) at this track in a Grade 5. Will jump from box 8 for the first time. Looks well placed and should feature.
